prompt:
Subject: A cool Japanese-style portrait at a summer cafe terrace
People/Expression: Young woman with black hair, loosely curled long hair, natural makeup, translucent skin, soft smile, natural eye contact, elegant and friendly atmosphere
Clothing/Pose: Fluffy white blouse, modest V-neck, light blue mini skirt, white strap sandals, delicate necklace, small white bag, natural posture showing off legs while sitting on a cafe chair, holding a spoon with one hand and enjoying peach shaved ice
Background/Light: Open-air cafe terrace on a Japanese street corner, glass windows, blackboard menu, potted greens, small round table, peach shaved ice and iced latte, soft summer sunlight, refreshing afternoon with a pleasant breeze
Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, near full-body portrait, subject placed slightly to the right, natural perspective, shallow depth of field, soft background blur, SNS-worthy lifestyle photo, composition surrounded by white hand-drawn lines around person and objects, scattered with handwritten notes
Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, natural skin texture visible down to pores and texture, smooth and natural skin texture, delicate hair details, bright and soft tones, magazine photo-like finish, translucent Japanese-style portrait, summery lightness, cafe snap-style expression with white hand-drawn characters, arrows, hearts, and sparkles added
Negative: Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, strange eye contact, asymmetrical eyes, collapsed face, distorted body, broken clothes, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, excessive exposure, unnatural texture specific to AI, illegible characters, garbled characters, logos, watermarks
